title: Improved Happy Ghast
description: Allows players to create a not-wandering, faster, smaller, silenced Happy Ghast, get damage alerts and even summon it back in survival using items.
body:
# Improved Happy Ghast

Allows players to create a **not-wandering**, **faster**, **smaller**, **silenced** Happy Ghast, get **damage alerts** and even **summon** it back in survival using items.

> Makes the Happy Ghast usable again while staying balanced and survival-friendly.

## Installation

After adding the data pack/mod to your world or server, you should be able to open the about panel, which is fully controllable with the mouse:

```mcfunction
/function improved_happy_ghast:about
```

![about_panel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/b50f15b82764868552d02f8b0f5ebb531d326ac3.png)

## Usage

The above-mentioned improvements can be done by **right-clicking** the Happy Ghast with **certain items** in the **mainhand** of the player. As a confirmation, the player will see particles and hear a subtle sound cue. To **revert** these changes, just repeat the mentioned steps again.

## Behavior Adjustments

Happy Ghasts also keep their riders underwater instead of forcing a dismount.

## Disable Wandering

**Item**: Brush

> **Right-clicking and applying**
>
> ![brush-ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/b433ab6d31e89ef1b3b42eddda51d6c4a21c2d74.png)

> **Not following snowballs and not-wandering**
>
> ![noai](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/7e7c935206b33559b32852c6f65065f3288435df.png)

## Increasing Speed

**Item**: Cookie

> **Right-clicking and applying**
>
> ![cookie-ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/9759212f397ca37f1c0eff9350d0ebdf77feba2e.png)

> **Faster, measured in-game speed at ~10b/s**
>
> ![fast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/21dd6bc6e19bdf77932347cbb2640da254ab3505.png)

## Reducing Size

**Item**: Brown Mushroom

> **Right-clicking and applying**
>
> ![mushroom-ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/6ced699caf98db444debd68899e2e08e22a36e4b.png)

> **Compared to a normal one on the right**
>
> ![smol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/966d5345b6381c08e1ad7098b701dfcf7a8252be.png)

## Silencing

**Item**: Honey Bottle

> **Right-clicking and applying**
>
> ![bottle-ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/a577a451b4fed746536ed51ae831efee983e0c96.png)

> **Now silent**
>
> ![silent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/1d104dd3334baaca53c6a5c9068fe89273ce7916.png)

## Summoning Back

**Item**: Goat Horn

> **Right-clicking and applying**
>
> ![horn-ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/9be1740cffe65439a8b469d07002c115cb95f2ca.png)

> **Summoned to your side, even across dimensions, via a Bound Horn**
>
> ![summoned](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/b28c1250d5107a12a03a7937830f98be2f537817.png)

## Damage Alerts

**Item**: _None_ (always active)

> **While riding**
>
> ![riding-hurt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/a04f4a732c10c5065b5b229bd6f1dc25a1c6f0ba.png)

> **While away as tamed owner**
>
> ![tamed-hurt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pzvYKAk/images/d972281daf7d5a4d60bbd265179e99ddad45bc39.png)

## Contributing & Issues

I warmly welcome:

- Bug reports
- Feature requests
- Pull requests

Please open issues or PRs on [GitHub](https://github.com/nwrenger/improved-happy-ghast/issues).
